input_roles.edit_target_image: Locks subject identity, clothing, pose, camera angle, subject scale and foreground relationship.
input_roles.background_reference_image: Provides scene space, perspective, environmental elements, color atmosphere and light direction.

change_scope: replace original background with referenced scene space and atmosphere
match edge transition, contact shadow, reflection, depth of field and air perspective
critical_requirements: Do not copy people or subjects from background_reference_image.
Lighting direction and contact relationship must be natural.
negative_constraints: do not change subject identity, expression, body, clothing or pose
do not copy people or subjects from the background reference
no white edge, hard cutout edge or lighting conflict

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Keep the subject from edit_target_image unchanged and replace only the background with the space and atmosphere from background_reference_image. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.
